homepage.kudos.title: Sun* Kudos
homepage.kudos.description:
NEW HIGHLIGHT OF SAA 2025
The recognition and appreciation activity for colleagues - happening for the first time for all Sunners. The activity will be launched in November 2025, encouraging Sun* members to share recognition and appreciation messages for colleagues through the system announced by the organizing committee. This will serve as input for the Heads Council to reference in the award selection process.
homepage.content.p1: In the face of the AI era's rapid changes and increasingly high demands from clients, Sun* has chosen a strategy of capability diversification. We strive not only to become elite in our field but also to aim for a higher goal: where every Sunner becomes a "problem-solver" - an expert capable of resolving any issue and finding solutions for every challenge posed by projects, clients, and society.
homepage.content.p2: Inspired by capability diversity, flexible development, and the spirit of digging deep to achieve breakthroughs in the AI era, "Root Further" has been chosen as the official theme for the Sun* Annual Awards 2025.
homepage.content.p3: Beyond its surface meaning, "Root Further" represents our journey to constantly reach further and root deeper, touching hidden "geological" layers to survive, rise, and nurture the ever-burning passion for value creation within every Sunner. Like roots continuously penetrating deep into the earth, strongly weaving through layers of "sediment" to absorb the very best, Sun* people are "absorbing" nutrients from the era and market challenges. We renew ourselves daily, expand our capabilities, and strongly "take root" in the AI era - a completely new, complex, and unpredictable "geological" layer that also holds countless potentials and opportunities.
homepage.content.quote: "A tree with deep roots fears no storm"
homepage.content.p4: In the face of a storm, only trees with roots strong enough can stand firm. An organization with individuals confident in their diverse capabilities, ready to create and embrace challenges, and master change is an organization that not only stands firm amidst fluctuations but also exploits every advantage to conquer the challenges of the times. Not merely the name of a new chapter in the organization's development journey, "Root Further" also serves as an encouragement, motivating each of us to dare to believe in ourselves, dare to dig deep, unlock every potential, dare to break limits, and dare to become the most multi-tasking and excellent version of ourselves. Because in the AI era, capability diversity and leveraging the power of the times are prerequisites for survival.

homepage.content.p5: No one knows beforehand what mysterious "geological" layers lie deep within the "ground" of the technology industry and the modern market. We only know that when "Root Further" has become the root spirit, we will not be afraid, but rather feel eager before any undefined region on the journey forward. Because we always believe that in those infinite realms, there are many miracles and opportunities for growth waiting for us.
